body:
```
box@6ff1ed98ca63:~$ $ --list
│ session   9a885274-3ccf-4b02-8927-852120d42583
│ start     2026-04-24 11:43:59.612
│
$ --list

/bin/sh: 0: Illegal option --

✗
│ finish    2026-04-24 11:43:59.645
│ duration  0.033s
│ exit      2
│
│ log       /tmp/start-command/logs/direct/9a885274-3ccf-4b02-8927-852120d42583.log
│ session   9a885274-3ccf-4b02-8927-852120d42583

Repository not detected - automatic issue creation skipped
```

So I expect for start command to have a way to get list of all previously executed and currently executing commands.

Double check if we have that, if not we should add it, by supporting `--list` option. That should be implemented for both JavaScript and Rust.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).
title: We need a way to see a lino formatted list of all commands we store `--status` for
